allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\alexa\\finlib"; npx cap add android 2>&1; Write-Output "CAP_ANDROID_EXIT:$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\alexa\\finlib"; npx cap sync android 2>&1; Write-Output "SYNC_EXIT:$LASTEXITCODE")
Bash(xargs '-I{}' bash -c 'hash=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f1\); git show $hash --name-only --format="" | grep -l "sql\\|migration" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== $hash ===" || true')

Bash(xargs '-I{}' bash -c 'hash=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f1\); rest=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f2-\); result=$\(git show $hash -- src/hooks/useData.js 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^\\+.*\\bloans\\b" | head -2\); if [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "=== $hash $rest ==="; echo "$result"; fi')

Bash(xargs '-I{}' bash -c 'hash=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f1\); rest=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f2-\); result=$\(git show $hash -- src/App.js 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^\\+.*\\bloans\\b.*upsert|^\\+.*upsert.*\\bloans\\b" | head -2\); if [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "=== $hash $rest ==="; echo "$result"; fi')

Bash(xargs '-I{}' bash -c 'hash=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f1\); rest=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f2-\); result=$\(git show $hash 2>/dev/null | grep -E "preferences.*column|column.*preferences|ALTER.*user_data.*preferences|ADD COLUMN.*preferences" | head -2\); if [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "=== $hash $rest ==="; echo "$result"; fi')

Bash(xargs '-I{}' bash -c 'hash=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f1\); rest=$\(echo "{}" | cut -d" " -f2-\); result=$\(git show $hash -- src/hooks/useData.js 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^\\+.*savePreferences|^\\+.*preferences.*prefs" | head -2\); if [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "=== $hash $rest ==="; echo "$result"; fi')
